orchestration_skills.name: plan-feature
orchestration_skills.purpose: Pre-implementation planning: requirements → design → Gherkin → iteration plans

orchestration_skills.name: refine-feature
orchestration_skills.purpose: Refine existing specs, designs, and plans

orchestration_skills.name: new-feature
orchestration_skills.purpose: End-to-end delivery: implementation → validation → review → docs

architecture_design.rule: Only orchestration skills name subagents. Specialist agents and skills do not reference each other.

mermaid_diagram:
graph LR
    user[User] --> plan[/plan-feature]
    user --> refine[/refine-feature]
    user --> deliver[/new-feature]
    plan -->|artifacts ready| deliver
    refine -->|artifacts ready| deliver
    plan --> specialists[Specialist subagents]
    refine --> specialists
    deliver --> specialists
